title: eriochloa gracilis
intro: Eriochloa gracilis, also known as Chinese cup grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Eriochloa gracilis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and support the immune system. Eriochloa gracilis can be prepared as a tea or decoction, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
